prestazioni: Upgrade to a bespoke Zenvo-developed twin-turbocharged 5.8L V8 (engine code: *AMG M178-derived ZS58T*) with forged internals, billet crankshaft, and Mahle Motorsport pistons, pushing power from 1,193 HP to 1,450 HP via a custom Zenvo ECU remap and dual Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with titanium-aluminide turbine wheels and 1.2 bar boost pressure

Installation of a Zenvo-specific 7-speed CIMA sequential transmission with a Pankl Racing Systems carbon-fiber driveshaft, AP Racing 6-piston calipers with 420mm carbon-ceramic rotors, and a Drexler Motorsport limited-slip differential with 45% lockup for optimized torque vectoring

Integration of a full Zenvo Motorsport-spec dry sump lubrication system with an external Accusump 3-quart reservoir, a Setrab 50-row oil cooler, and a custom billet aluminum oil pan with integrated windage tray to prevent oil starvation during sustained 2.5G lateral loads
estetica: Full Zenvo Aerodynamics Division carbon-fiber body kit, including a 3D-printed front splitter with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via cockpit switch), a fixed rear wing with dual-plane airfoil design (NACA 63A012 profile), and side skirts with integrated vortex generators for boundary layer control

Custom Zenvo-designed 22-inch forged aluminum wheels by Dymag (model: *Zenvo TS1 GT-spec*), featuring a 9.5x22 front and 12.5x22 rear setup with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30 ZR22 front, 345/25 ZR22 rear) and titanium wheel bolts by HRE Performance

Full interior rework with a Zenvo-exclusive Alcantara and carbon-fiber trim package, including a Sparco Pro 2000 GT1 racing seat with 6-point Schroth Racing harnesses, a custom MOMO Zenvo Edition steering wheel with integrated AIM MXS Strada data display, and a bespoke titanium roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA 8862-2009 certified)
